prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The Kurt Gödel Society organized the Vienna Summer of Logic, a scientific event that took place from July 9 to 24, 2014, featuring 12 major conferences and workshops on mathematical logic, logic in computer science, and logic in artificial intelligence. The event was attended by over 2000 scientists and researchers, with the Logic in Computer Science stream comprising the FLoC, CSF, ICP, ILP, IJCAR, ITP, and ITP conferences.
B. The Vienna Summer of Logic, a scholarly gathering held in the summer of 2014, brought together 12 significant conferences and numerous workshops. These events spanned the disciplines of mathematical logic, logic as applied in computer science, and logic within the domain of artificial intelligence. The collection of meetings occurred between July 9th and July 24th, 2014, drawing an attendance of over 2000 scientists and researchers. The Kurt Gödel Society, based at Vienna University of Technology, was responsible for orchestrating this event. Among the conferences that participated were: Within the Logic in Computer Science track (which was part of the Federated Logic Conference (FLoC)): the International Conference on Computer Aided Verification (CAV), the IEEE Computer Security Foundations Symposium (CSF), the International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP), the International Joint Conference on Automated Reasoning (IJCAR), the Conference on Interactive Theorem Proving (ITP), and the combined session of the EACSL Annual Conference on Computer Science Logic (CSL) and the
C. The Vienna Summer of Logic was a scientific event in the summer of 2014, combining 12 major conferences and several workshops from the fields of mathematical logic, logic in computer science, and logic in artificial intelligence. The meetings took place from July 9 to 24, 2014, and attracted more than 2000 scientists and researchers.The event was organized by the Kurt Gödel Society at Vienna University of Technology. Answer:
